# ObservabilityIndex - Full Content for AI/LLM Consumption
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/observability-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index | Apache-2.0 License | Last updated: 2026-03-10

---

# OVERVIEW

ObservabilityIndex is a live LLMOps cost and reliability benchmark. It provides inference pricing, latency, error rates, and throughput across 25+ providers. Updated every 6 hours via automated pipelines. Designed for MLOps teams, platform engineers, researchers, and AI systems.

# CORE DATASETS

## 1. Inference Pricing
Per-token and per-request pricing for LLM inference across 25+ providers.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/observability-index/main/exports/latest.json

## 2. Latency Benchmarks
P50, P95, and P99 latency measurements for model inference endpoints.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/observability-index/main/exports/latest.csv

## 3. Error Rates & Reliability
Uptime, error rates, and reliability scores per provider and model.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/observability-index/main/exports/latest.json

## 4. Throughput Metrics
Tokens-per-second and requests-per-minute capacity across providers.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/observability-index/main/exports/latest.csv

# KEY FINDINGS

- Inference pricing varies up to 10x across providers for equivalent models
- Latency can differ by 3-5x between providers for the same model
- Error rates spike during peak hours, especially for smaller providers
- Throughput capacity is often the limiting factor for production deployments

# SIBLING INDEXES

- [AI Infrastructure Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/): GPU specs, cloud pricing, benchmarks
- [AI TRiSM Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/): AI governance, risk, security vendors
- [AI Red Teaming Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/): Red team tools, benchmarks, vulnerability data
- [AI LLMOps Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/): LLM observability, cost, compliance
- [AI AppSec Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/): AI remediation, ASPM, vulnerability tracking
- [NeutronIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/neutron-index/): Multi-cloud GPU pricing, TCO, carbon intensity
- [AdversaryIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/adversary-index/): Adversarial threats, attack success rates
- [GovernanceIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/governance-index/): Regulatory risk, compliance scoring

# FORMATS

- JSON (structured): exports/ directory
- CSV (analysis-ready): exports/ directory
- Croissant ML metadata: croissant.json
- Schema.org structured data: schema.jsonld

Data: Apache-2.0 | Code: Apache-2.0
